3.translation: you will be able to do justice

24.translation: And (prohibited are) the ones who are married

49.translation: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed

53.translation: (even as much as the) speck on a date seed

68.translation: And We would have guided them

77.translation: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed

90.translation: surely He (would have) given them power
and surely they (would have) fought you

119.translation: And I will surely mislead them
and surely arouse desires in them
and surely I will order them
so they will surely cut off
and surely I will order them

124.translation: (even as much as) the speck on a date-seed

127.translation: and the ones who are weak

172.translation: the ones who are near (to Allah)

173.translation: then He will give them in full
